description_long: This is a luxurious wristwatch with a gold-toned metal bracelet and a round, black dial. The watch face features three subdials, gold hour markers, and gold hands, giving it a sophisticated and high-end appearance. The bracelet is composed of interlocking rectangular links, providing both durability and elegance. The side of the watch case includes a prominent crown and two pushers, likely for chronograph functions. The back of the bracelet is solid and matches the gold finish of the rest of the watch. The overall design is sleek, modern, and suitable for formal or upscale urban settings.
description: A gold-toned wristwatch with a black dial, three subdials, and a metal link bracelet, exuding a modern and luxurious style.
description_view_0: Front view showing the black dial, gold hour markers, three subdials, and the full face of the watch.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the thickness of the case, the crown, and pushers on the right side.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the solid gold-toned bracelet links and the back of the watch case.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the smooth, uninterrupted side of the case and the bracelet curvature.
